description:
Advances: mutagen.cli, mutagen.mutation_enumeration

Closes **F28 / CF11** (MEDIUM consensus from Security + Performance — Security M1, Performance F-PERF-07/12).

CLI accepts unlimited repetition of `--scope` / `--tests`. The enumerator materializes every site in memory before the runner starts. No aggregate budget. Per-site timeout doesnt bound the whole run. Three avenues for runaway resource use.

## Deliverable

- Cap `--scope` / `--tests` repetition at 100 each. Reject excess with `:too_many_targets`.
- Cap total enumerated sites at a sensible upper bound (e.g. 10,000). Configurable via `--max-sites`.
- Add `--budget-ms <N>` for aggregate wall-clock budget. When exceeded, the runner terminates gracefully and emits a partial JSON report with `truncated: true`.
- Fix `phase_scope` O(n²): the `acc ++ records` accumulation in lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:311-323 — prepend-then-reverse. (This is a half-overlap with F20 / `.25`; do it here since its at the same touch points.)
- Revise `.spec/specs/cli.spec.md` + `.spec/specs/mutation_enumeration.spec.md` accordingly.

## Verification

- New cli_test.exs: 101 scopes → `:too_many_targets`; 10,001 sites → `:too_many_sites`; budget elapsed → partial report
- Benchmark: `phase_scope` with 1000 records — assert O(n) not O(n²) via timing or operation count
- mix test green

## Allowed touches

- lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (phase_scope + aggregate budget)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex (site cap)
- .spec/specs/cli.spec.md, mutation_enumeration.spec.md
- Corresponding test files
- README.md, CHANGELOG.md

## Out of Scope

- Streaming the enumerator (Stream.transform conversion) — that is F44 / `.25` (AST/perf mega)
- NDJSON output streaming — that is F17 / `.30`

## Merge gate
- [ ] mix test green / strict pre-merge green
- [ ] Cap-enforcement tests pass
- [ ] phase_scope O(n) regression test passes
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE
title: Caps on --scope/--tests/total sites + --budget-ms + phase_scope O(n) fix
